meanings.definition: a serious (often fatal) disease of the immune system transmitted through blood products especially by sexual contact or contaminated needles
the activity of contributing to the fulfillment of a need or furtherance of an effort or purpose
examples: he gave me an assist with the housework
rescue party went to their aid

meanings.definition: money to support a worthy person or cause
the work of providing treatment for or attending to someone or something
examples: the old car needs constant attention

meanings.definition: give help or assistance; be of service
examples: Everyone helped out during the earthquake
Can you help me carry this table?
She never helps around the house
These pills will help the patient
